title: Gan Fall Enters the Fight
description: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Conis, Wyper, Luffy. Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't say such scary things, Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It looks like a sacrificial alter...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's a bunch more sky sharks!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I don't know...I've never met him.

summary: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
